emails.subject: Re: GE consent
emails.body: Re: GE consent Here you go. It's pretty specific to the Pastoria contract, but has been blessed by Mike Barnas (subject, of course, to GE getting what they want on a guaranty!!! grrrr). Kay Mann@ENRON 04/02/2001 08:20 AM

emails.subject: GE consent
emails.body: Hi Karen, Could I get a copy of whatever the latest version is of the GE consent for Pastoria? We have a potential deal coming up to move some frames out of TurboPark, so I would like to see the current state-of-the-are version. Thanks, Kay
